expectations.text: Recommends sequential upgrade path (1.28→1.29→1.30) rather than skipping
expectations.evidence: Clearly shows 1.28→1.29→1.30 path with rationale: 'Direct jumps (1.28→1.30) are technically supported but sequential upgrades catch incompatibilities early.'

expectations.text: Specifies control plane upgrades before node pool upgrades
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 and 3 are control plane upgrades, Phase 2 and 4 are node pool upgrades. Explicit ordering throughout.

expectations.text: Provides different node pool upgrade ordering with rationale for the sequence
expectations.evidence: Orders general-purpose → high-memory → GPU with rationale: 'This order minimizes stateful workload disruption.'

expectations.text: Includes specific surge upgrade settings (maxSurge/maxUnavailable) for each pool
expectations.evidence: General-purpose: maxSurge=2/maxUnavailable=0, High-memory: maxSurge=1/maxUnavailable=0, GPU: maxSurge=1/maxUnavailable=0.

expectations.text: Addresses Postgres-specific concerns (PDB, backup, operator compatibility, PV reclaim)
expectations.evidence: Covers PDBs for Postgres, DB backups, operator compatibility check, PV reclaim policies in pre-upgrade checklist. Dedicated upgrade section for Postgres pool.

expectations.text: Addresses GPU-specific concerns (driver compatibility, workload coordination)
expectations.evidence: GPU driver compatibility check in pre-upgrade, dedicated GPU pool upgrade section with nvidia-smi verification and FailedScheduling event check.

expectations.text: Includes actual gcloud commands for the upgrade steps
expectations.evidence: Full gcloud commands for every phase: cluster upgrade, node-pool update, node-pool upgrade, describe, operations list.
Detailed pre-upgrade checklist with 4 sections: Compatibility, Workload Readiness, Infrastructure, Ops Readiness.

expectations.text: Provides a post-upgrade checklist with validation commands
expectations.evidence: Post-upgrade checklist with Cluster Health, Workload Health, Observability, and Cleanup sections with kubectl/gcloud commands.
Full Rollback & Contingency Plan section with gcloud commands for creating rollback pool, cordoning, draining, and 'When to rollback' criteria.
